title: andropogon saccharoides var. torreyanus
intro: Andropogon saccharoides var. torreyanus, also known as Switch Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its tall stems and broad leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Switch Grass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and protect against infection. Switch Grass can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
